title: disterigma penaeoides
intro: Disterigma penaeoides, also known as the Ant Tree, is a plant species found in the tropical regions of the Philippines. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe wounds and prevent infection. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving coughs, and treating digestive issues. In herbal preparations, Disterigma penaeoides is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
